findings: Core status rules are clear: success only at 50 squad leads and 250 workers launched, partial on prevented full launch, failed on zero squad leads.
swarm-state.json has a stronger launch-proof schema than the final commander bundle.
Gap: final bundle schema does not require launch_proof, partial or failure reasons, or explicit consistency checks between status and telemetry.
README reiterates partial-not-success policy but does not tighten the final bundle contract.
